reviewer_attack: Too much protocol, not enough real proof.

manuscript_control: Do not claim clinical performance; present current packages as protocol evidence and require full-scale EEG evidence before stronger claims.
true_closure_requirement: Full-scale signal-derived EEG package, preferably CHB-MIT/TUSZ, with patient-independent event scoring and per-patient distributions.
interpretation: Attack cannot be fully closed internally; it is converted into an explicit pre-submission dependency.
